briefdescription.para: Initialize a channel of a DMA engine.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the BD ring for this channel

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the DMA channel to work on

briefdescription.para: This function resets one DMA channel.

detaileddescription.para: The registers will be default values after the reset

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the DMA channel to work on

briefdescription.para: This function checks whether reset operation is done.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the DMA channel to work on

listitem.para: 0 if reset is done
1 if reset is still going

briefdescription.para: Check whether a DMA channel is busy.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

listitem.para: non zero if the channel is busy
0 is the channel is idle

briefdescription.para: Get the current status of a channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

briefdescription.para: Dump registers from one DMA channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

briefdescription.para: Set the channel to run in parking mode.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if everything is fine
XST_FAILURE if hardware is not running

briefdescription.para: Set the channel to run in circular mode, exiting parking mode.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

briefdescription.para: Set the channel to run in frame count enable mode.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

briefdescription.para: Enable interrupts for a channel.

detaileddescription.para: Interrupts that are not specified by the interrupt mask are not affected.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on
is the interrupt mask for interrupts to be enabled

briefdescription.para: Disable interrupts for a channel.

detaileddescription.para: Interrupts that are not specified by the interrupt mask are not affected.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on
is the interrupt mask for interrupts to be disabled

briefdescription.para: Get pending interrupts of a channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

simplesect.para: The interrupts mask represents pending interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Get the enabled interrupts of a channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

simplesect.para: The interrupts mask represents pending interrupts.

briefdescription.para: Clear interrupts of a channel.

detaileddescription.para: Interrupts that are not specified by the interrupt mask are not affected.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on
is the interrupt mask for interrupts to be cleared

briefdescription.para: Start a transfer.

detaileddescription.para: This function setup the DMA engine and start the engine to do the transfer.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on
is the pointer to the setup structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS for a successful submission
XST_FAILURE if channel has not being initialized
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the DMA channel is not idle, BDs are still being used
XST_INVAID_PARAM if parameters in config structure not valid

briefdescription.para: Setup BD addresses to a different memory region.

detaileddescription.para: In some systems, it is convenient to put BDs into a certain region of the memory. This function enables that.

Channel
is the pointer to the channel to work on
BdAddrPhys
is the physical starting address for BDs
BdAddrVirt
is the Virtual starting address for BDs. For systems that do not use MMU, then virtual address is the same as physical address
XST_SUCCESS for a successful setup
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the DMA channel is not idle, BDs are still being used
We assume that the memory region starting from BdAddrPhys is large enough to hold all the BDs.

briefdescription.para: Configure one DMA channel using the configuration structure.

detaileddescription.para: Setup the control register and BDs, however, BD addresses are not set.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on
is the pointer to the setup structure

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful
XST_FAILURE if channel has not being initialized
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the DMA channel is not idle
XST_INVALID_PARAM if fields in ChannelCfgPtr is not valid

briefdescription.para: Configure buffer addresses for one DMA channel.

detaileddescription.para: The buffer addresses are physical addresses. Access to 32 Frame Buffer Addresses in direct mode is done through XAxiVdma_ChannelHiFrmAddrEnable/Disable Functions. 0 - Access Bank0 Registers (0x5C - 0x98) 1 - Access Bank1 Registers (0x5C - 0x98)

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on
is the set of addresses for the transfers
is the number of frames to set the address

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful
XST_FAILURE if channel has not being initialized
XST_DEVICE_BUSY if the DMA channel is not idle, BDs are still being used
XST_INVAID_PARAM if buffer address not valid, for example, unaligned address with no DRE built in the hardware

briefdescription.para: Start one DMA channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if successful
XST_FAILURE if channel is not initialized
XST_DMA_ERROR if: . The DMA channel fails to stop . The DMA channel fails to start
XST_DEVICE_BUSY is the channel is doing transfers

briefdescription.para: Stop one DMA channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on

briefdescription.para: Set the frame counter and delay counter for one channel.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on
is the frame counter value to be set
is the delay counter value to be set

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if setup finishes successfully
XST_FAILURE if channel is not initialized
XST_INVALID_PARAM if the configuration structure has invalid values
XST_NO_FEATURE if Frame Counter or Delay Counter is disabled

briefdescription.para: Get the frame counter and delay counter for both channels.

parameterdescription.para: is the pointer to the channel to work on
is the pointer for the returning frame counter value
is the pointer for the returning delay counter value

simplesect.para: If FrmCnt return as 0, then the channel is not initialized
